caption: A presentation slide highlights a housing project in Bedford titled "Bedford Village Apartments." The slide features four identical photos of a multi-story apartment complex with brown siding and a wooden staircase, set against a green lawn with a blossoming pink cherry tree in the foreground. Below the photos, text specifies that the project consists of "96 units of non-age restricted rental in 10 buildings," noting that it was "Purchased by POAH in 2018, restrictions were set to expire" and utilized "$3 million of CPA funds." The bottom of the slide is marked with a yellow bar containing the word "Preservation" and a small "MHP" logo. Across the sampled frames, the visual content remains static, showing no movement or changes in the imagery or the accompanying text.
